task:
A baseline Zoom config file exists at /home/user/.config/zoomus.conf with `[General]autoMuteMic=false`.

Set `[General]autoMuteMic` to `true` so Zoom automatically mutes the microphone whenever the user joins a meeting. Save the file in-place at /home/user/.config/zoomus.conf — do not write to any other path. Do not change any other keys (leave `[General]language=en-US` untouched).
